_description: Shared Layer-1 (WalletCore/WASM, packages/core) / Layer-2 (RN-JS/viem, packages/sdk) golden vector for an Ethereum native-coin transfer, in BOTH legacy and EIP-1559 form. Read via a plain readFileSync (not an import) by packages/core/mpc/tx/compile/compileTx.golden.test.ts AND packages/sdk/tests/unit/platforms/react-native/tx-builder-golden-vectors.test.ts, since packages/sdk does not depend on packages/core and a file read sidesteps the workspace dependency graph entirely. This is the SINGLE source of truth for this fixture - do not duplicate these values as literals in either test file.
_variantNote: Both fee variants are pinned on purpose: legacy-vs-EIP-1559 type selection and gas-field ordering are exactly the divergence class that would split a 2-of-2 keysign between an RN device and a WalletCore device (each side hashing different bytes for the same logical transfer). expectedSigningHashHex is keccak-256 of the unsigned RLP/typed envelope - the value fed to MPC signing by both families.
